details.test: Task 1: Save three beginner-friendly microphones to wishlist
Task 3: Select 1080p60 capture card with most HDMI inputs and add to cart
Task 4: Select USB mic from buying guide and save to wishlist
Task 5: Compare 60fps 1080p webcam under $100 with cheapest 30fps under $70
Task 6: Add two discounted ring lights and increase quantity of cheaper one
Task 7: Use quiz to build ~$600 kit and replace mic if over budget
Task 8: Submit compatibility question for XLR audio interface
Task 9: Create beginner reading list with camera, audio, and lighting guides
